_note: FIXTURE DATA — hand-authored realistic snapshot, NOT live. Shape mirrors the Kalshi public REST API. Prices are index-aligned with outcomes. Regenerate live copies with delphi/scripts/fetch_kalshi.py.

markets.question: Will Bitcoin be above $100,000 at the end of 2026?
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the CME CF Bitcoin Reference Rate (BRR) on December 31, 2026 at 4:00 PM ET is at or above $100,000.

markets.question: Will the Fed cut rates at the September 2026 meeting?
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the FOMC lowers the target federal funds rate at the meeting concluding September 17, 2026.

markets.question: Will CPI year-over-year for August 2026 be above 3.0%?
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the BLS-reported CPI-U year-over-year change for August 2026 exceeds 3.0%.

markets.question: Will the US enter a recession in 2026 (NBER)?
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the NBER declares a recession with a peak in calendar year 2026.

markets.question: Will there be a US federal government shutdown before October 2026?
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if a federal funding lapse causes a shutdown of any duration before October 1, 2026.

markets.question: Will the S&P 500 close above 6000 on December 31, 2026?
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the official S&P 500 closing level on December 31, 2026 is above 6000.

markets.question: Will the Boston Celtics win the 2027 NBA Finals?
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the Boston Celtics win the 2027 NBA Finals.
